results.definition_en: Not asleep; with the eyes open.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 醒著的;未入睡、雙眼睜開的。
results.example_en: She is awake at six every morning.
results.example_zh_tw: 她每天早上六點就醒了。

results.definition_en: Not good; of low quality or wrong.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 壞的、不好的;低劣或錯誤的。
results.example_en: The food has gone bad.

results.definition_en: Curved; not straight.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 彎的、彎曲的;具弧度、非直的。
results.example_en: The nail is bent and will not go in.

results.definition_en: Having a sharp, harsh taste, not sweet.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 苦的、苦澀的;味道刺烈、非甜美。
results.example_en: Coffee can have a bitter taste.

results.definition_en: Of the colour of the clear sky in the day.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 藍色的;如晴日天空之色。
results.example_en: The sea looks blue today.

results.definition_en: Being sure; without doubt.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 確定的、必定的;無疑慮的。
results.example_en: I am certain that she will come.

results.definition_en: Not hot; of low heat.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 冷的、寒冷的;非熱、溫度低的。
results.example_en: Drink your milk before it gets cold.

results.definition_en: With all the parts; full and finished.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 完整的、完成的;具備所有部分、已結束的。
results.example_en: Her work is complete now.

results.definition_en: Causing pain or harm with no care.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 殘忍的、殘酷的;漠然地造成痛苦或傷害。
results.example_en: It is cruel to leave a dog out in the rain.

results.definition_en: With little or no light.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 黑暗的、深色的;光線少或無。
results.example_en: It is dark in the room at night.

results.definition_en: Not living any more.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 死的、死亡的;不再存活。
results.example_en: The plant is dead from too much sun.

results.definition_en: Loved much; or costing much money.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 親愛的、昂貴的;受人珍愛或價格高。
results.example_en: My dear friend, please come in.

results.definition_en: Easy to break or hurt; soft and small.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 脆弱的、精細的;易碎或柔小的。
results.example_en: The glass is delicate, hold it with care.

results.definition_en: Not the same.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 不同的、相異的;與他者有異。
results.example_en: Her dress is different from mine.
results.example_zh_tw: 她的洋裝跟我的不一樣。

results.definition_en: Not clean; with dirt on it.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 髒的、污穢的;沾有污垢的。
results.example_en: Your hands are dirty, go wash them.

results.definition_en: Without water; not wet.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 乾的、乾燥的;無水分。
results.example_en: The leaves are dry on the floor.

results.definition_en: Not true; or made to look real but is not.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 假的、錯誤的;非真、看似真但實非。
results.example_en: She gave a false name to the police.

results.definition_en: Without strength; weak.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 虛弱的、無力的;缺乏氣力。
results.example_en: His voice was feeble after the illness.

results.definition_en: Of the sex that can give birth; like a woman or a girl.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 女性的、雌性的;能生育、屬女方一性。
results.example_en: The female cat had three kittens.
results.example_zh_tw: 那隻母貓生了三隻小貓。

results.definition_en: Without good sense; doing things one should not.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 愚蠢的、傻的;欠缺判斷、做出不當之事。
results.example_en: It was foolish to go out in the storm.

results.definition_en: Of the time still to come.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 未來的;即將到來的時光。
results.example_en: She has great plans for the future.

results.definition_en: Of the colour of grass or leaves.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 綠色的;如草或葉之色。
results.example_en: The hills are green in spring.

results.definition_en: Not in good health; with a disease.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 生病的、不適的;身體不佳、患病。
results.example_en: She is ill with a bad cough.

results.definition_en: Coming at the end, after all others.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 最後的;在他者之後、位居末位的。
results.example_en: She is the last person to leave.

results.definition_en: After the right time; not on time.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 遲的、晚的;超過預定時間。
results.example_en: She is late for the meeting.
